title: calamintha officinalis subsp. glandulosa
intro: Calamintha officinalis subsp. glandulosa, also known as glandular calamintha or mountain balm, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote restful sleep. The health benefits of calamintha officinalis subsp. glandulosa are attributed to its ability to calm the nervous system, ease muscle tension, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create calming and relaxing remedies for a range of health concerns.
